ogTitle: Merewether Heights vs Merimbula: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Merewether Heights and Merimbula.
heading: Merewether Heights vs Merimbula — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Merewether Heights, New South Wales and Merimbula, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Merewether Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Merimbula (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Merewether Heights or Merimbula safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Merewether Heights has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Merimbula scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Merewether Heights scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Merimbula scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Merewether Heights or Merimbula?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Merewether Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
